arts.ttl: Diego Simeone prepared for Julian Alvarez risk against Getafe
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid face a La Liga trip across the capital to take on Getafe tomorrow as the title race tightens up. Los Rojiblancos can edge up to top spot with a win after Barcelona’s weekend clash with Osasuna was postponed. arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer huge injury scare ahead of Atletico Madrid second leg
arts.sum: The availability of Antonio Rudiger is a major concern for Real Madrid ahead of their Champions League tie with Atletico.
The LaLiga title race is becoming a gripping contest and Liam Flin is previewing all 10 games in the Spanish top flight in week 27.
